title: 20Pcs Gold Foil Star Balloon, 18 Inch Gold Star Foil Balloons for Helium, Helium Mylar Ballons, Perfect for Graduation,Brithday,Engagement,Wedding Party Decorations
features: Premium Quality Star Balloons: These gold star balloons are made from high-quality aluminum foil, ensuring a smooth, glossy surface and vibrant colors that instantly elevate your party decor, These star shape balloons are not only visually stunning but also durable, resistant to deformation, and built with an auto-seal to prevent air leakage, Each star balloon holds its shape beautifully and can be safely deflated and reused for your next celebration

Affordable Set: Our packaging includes 20 10 x 18 inch Venus foil balloons and 2 1 x 10 meter ribbons, The gold star shaped balloons suitable for any party, can leave unforgettable memories for the guests attending the party,18Inch is large enough to better embellish your party

Versatile Party Decorations: Create stunning balloon bouquets for party entrances or design eye-catching photo backdrops with these gold stars, Ideal for thematic celebrations including children's birthdays, weddings, graduations and baby showers

18 Inch Large Star Balloons: Generous size makes these foil balloons for helium highly visible as venue decorations, Each package contains twenty gold star balloons to provide ample coverage for various event spaces and decorative arrangements

Reusable Celebration Essentials: These gold foil balloons can be carefully deflated after events for future use, Store properly away from sharp objects and direct sunlight to maintain their metallic shine and prolong usability
